ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Official name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector category the company belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "earnings_growth" REAL /* Earnings growth over the last quarter */,
  "book_value" REAL /* Book value per share */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding market data */,
  "return_on_assets" REAL /* Return on assets ratio */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margins as a percentage */,
  "earnings_growth_annual" REAL /* Annual earnings growth rate */,
  "return_2020" REAL /* Return on investment in the year 2020 */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-Equity ratio */,
  "price_to_book_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Book ratio */,
  "operating_margin" REAL /* Operating margin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("market_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string defining the permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Company ID the price is associated with */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "opening_price" REAL /* Opening stock price for the day */,
  "closing_price" REAL /* Closing stock price for the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest stock price during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest stock price during the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adj_closing_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Company ID associated with the dividend */,
  "dividend_date" TEXT /* Date when the dividend was paid */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of dividend per share */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividends */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the dividend amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Company ID the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Company ID the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_comments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who set the alert */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric to monitor (e.g., market_cap, profit_margin) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who created the watchlist */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Company ID being monitored in the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the watchlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
